title: "Insert into ... select distinct ..." fails with MALException:mkey.bulk_rotate_xor_hash:operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (user_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE items (item_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, item_name VARCHAR(100), price DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO items (item_name, price) SELECT DISTINCT username, 0.00 FROM users;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO ... SELECT DISTINCT causes MALException
